stories.title: Walk-Off Win — Cubs 3, Padres 2 (June 29)
stories.angle: Walk-off series opener win; Suzuki game-ending single off Mason Miller in 9th; MLB-leading 10th walk-off win of 2026; Trent Thornton (3-2) got the W; Cubs now 47-38

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
SUZUKI AGAIN.

Ninth inning, bases loaded. Seiya Suzuki lines a walk-off single off Mason Miller — Cubs win 3-2.

MLB-leading 10th walk-off of the 2026 season. No team in baseball wins like Chicago.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

research.facts:
Walk-Off Win — Cubs 3, Padres 2 (June 29)

stories.title: Roster Churn — Shaw + Roberts on IL, Alcántara + Hollowell Recalled
stories.angle: Double IL placement (Shaw left hand sprain, Roberts right forearm) + double recall (Alcántara .273/.367/.569 15 HR at Iowa; Hollowell); Cubs continue to shuffle the active roster

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
The Cubs placed BOTH Matt Shaw (left hand) and Ethan Roberts (right forearm) on the IL.

Kevin Alcántara and Gavin Hollowell return from Iowa.

Alcántara: .273/.367/.569, 15 HRs at Triple-A. The door is open.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

research.facts:
Roster Churn — Shaw + Roberts on IL, Alcántara + Hollowell Recalled
- **[HIGH]** Matt Shaw placed on 10-day IL with left hand sprain — MLB.com news headline "Cubs place Shaw (left hand), Roberts (right forearm) on IL" + Bleed Cubbie Blue + Bleacher Nation (3 sources)
- **[HIGH]** Ethan Roberts placed on IL with right forearm — same 3 sources
- **[HIGH]** Kevin Alcántara recalled from Triple-A Iowa — Bleed Cubbie Blue, CBS Sports, Bleacher Nation
- **[HIGH]** Gavin Hollowell recalled — Bleacher Nation headline "Kevin Alcantara and Gavin Hollowell Return as Matt Shaw and Ethan Roberts Hit the IL" (2 sources)
- **[MEDIUM]** Alcántara Triple-A stats: .273/.367/.569, 15 HR in 55 games — CBS Sports player page (single source, reasonable for a near-top prospect)

stories.title: Wild Card Watch — Cubs 47-38, NL WC2
stories.angle: Cubs 47-38 own NL WC2; Phillies 0.5 game ahead at WC1; Cardinals within 2 games; a hot July matters

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Cubs 47-38. NL Wild Card No. 2 is theirs to lose.

Phillies (47-37) stay a half-game ahead. Cardinals are within striking distance.

A win tonight at Wrigley makes July a lot more comfortable.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

research.facts:
Wild Card Watch — Cubs 47-38, NL WC2
- **[HIGH]** Cubs 47-38 — series-context.json cubs_record field (generated 2026-06-30 08:30 UTC)
- **[HIGH]** Padres 43-40 — series-context.json opponent_record
- **[HIGH]** Phillies 47-37 (NL WC1) — standings search AI summary, consistent with multiple sources (ESPN, CBS, FOX, MLB.com)

research.sources: - Sources: series-context.json, ESPN WC standings, MLB.com standings

stories.title: Game 2 Preview — Boyd vs. Sears, 7:05 PM CT Wrigley
stories.angle: Boyd (31:6 K:BB ratio, elite command for an injury-ravaged rotation) vs. Sears (9-11, 5.04 ERA); Cubs hold the pitching edge; must win series before July road trip

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Matthew Boyd vs. JP Sears. 7:05 PM CT. Wrigley Field.

Boyd has walked just 6 batters all season with 31 strikeouts — elite command for a rotation scrapping through injuries.

Sears comes in at 5.04 ERA. The pitching matchup favors Chicago.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: PCA All-Star — Fan Vote Phase Closes July 2
stories.angle: PCA climbed from 14th to 10th in NL OF voting; phase 2 closes July 2; still needs top-6; team rep rule likely saves him; season WAR 4.6 leads all MLB position players

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Pete Crow-Armstrong climbed from 14th to 10th in NL OF voting. The current phase closes July 2.

Top 6 advance to the final ballot. He's not there yet.

4.6 WAR. Best June in recent Cubs history. The snub is real.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs

research.facts:
PCA All-Star Fan Vote
- **[HIGH]** PCA finished 10th in NL OF phase 1 voting — confirmed by multiple sources (CubbiesCrib, Yahoo Sports, SI.com, DaWindyCity all describe 10th place in NL OF)
- **[HIGH]** Moved from 14th to 10th (previous pipeline June 29 had him at 14th — this is a consistent progression)
- **[HIGH]** Top 6 NL OF advance to final ballot — confirmed, standard MLB All-Star voting rules
- **[MEDIUM]** Phase 2 fan vote open June 29–July 2 — from AI summary; standard voting window; MEDIUM because exact dates from summary
- **[MEDIUM]** PCA vote total: 1,063,065 (~400k short of 6th spot) — from AI summary; single search source
- **[HIGH]** PCA season stats: 4.6 WAR (bWAR and fWAR both) leads all MLB position players — confirmed in Wikipedia link + multiple fan site references; consistent across 3+ sources
- **[MEDIUM]** Season slash .286/.363/.521 (.883 OPS), 16 HR, 40 RBI through ~77 games — from AI search summary; consistent with prior pipeline stats trajectory
- **[HIGH]** Team rep rule: each club guaranteed one All-Star representative — official MLB rule, confirmed multiple sources
research.sources: - Sources: CubbiesCrib, Yahoo Sports (two articles), SI.com, DaWindyCity, Wikipedia (PCA page)

stories.title: Trade Deadline + Wiggins — 34 Days and Counting
stories.angle: 34 days to August 3; Jaxon Wiggins threw 3.2 scoreless innings at South Bend (0 R, 0 BB, 4 K); expected to report to Iowa next; rotation still needs a deadline acquisition

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
34 days until August 3.

Jaxon Wiggins threw 3.2 scoreless innings for South Bend — zero runs, zero walks, four strikeouts. His next stop is Triple-A Iowa.

The rotation still needs a trade deadline move. But the cavalry is getting closer.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

research.facts:
Trade Deadline + Wiggins
- **[HIGH]** August 3 trade deadline — confirmed in prior pipelines + ESPN deadline article
- **[HIGH]** 34 days from June 30 to August 3 — calculated (June 30 + 34 days = August 3)
- **[MEDIUM]** Wiggins South Bend start: 3.2 IP, 0 R, 2 H, 4 K, 0 BB — from Bleed Cubbie Blue minor league wrap (AI summary); single source; consistent with recovery trajectory from June 28 Fort Wayne appearance
- **[MEDIUM]** Wiggins expected next at Triple-A Iowa — Yahoo Sports headline ("Cubs Top Pitching Prospect Jaxon Wiggins Returns Following Multi-Month Absence"); directional
- **[HIGH]** Wiggins was on MiLB IL with right elbow inflammation — confirmed MLB.com news + multiple sources
research.sources: - Sources: Bleed Cubbie Blue (minor league wrap, bleedcubbieblue.com/chicago-cubs-prospects/223530), Yahoo Sports (Wiggins return), MLB.com news, ChiCitySports
